name: Undying Loyalty
text:
This costs :rb_energy_2: less if you choose a Bird, Cat, Dog, or Poro.
Play a unit with cost no more than :rb_energy_2: and no more than :rb_rune_rainbow: from your trash, ignoring its cost.
